title: pseudobombax majus
intro: Pseudobombax majus, also known as the Kapok tree or Bombax tree, is a deciduous tree native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's seeds and pods have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pseudobombax majus include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various infections, as well as being used as a diuretic to treat urinary issues. Pseudobombax majus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a powder or capsule.
